name: Absolutely Delicious Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar and vanilla extract.
2. Add the softened cream cheese and stir until well combined.
3. Gradually add the sour cream, stirring continuously to avoid lumps.
4. Stir in the Cool Whip until evenly incorporated.
5. Crush the graham crackers into fine crumbs using a food processor or sifter.
6. Mix the crumbs with the cheesecake batter until well mixed.
7. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pie crusts.
8. Spread the cherry pie filling evenly over the top of the cheesecake.
9. Chill in the refrigerator for approximately 2 hours before serving, allowing the cheesecake to set and flavors to meld together.
